queries.q: Create a launch checklist for the v3 mobile app release going out in two weeks
We ship the enterprise tier in ten days and I'm worried support and legal haven't signed off; help me track readiness across every team
Build the go/no-go readiness doc for the payments migration, including rollback plan and owner assignments
We're coordinating engineering, marketing, and support for the rebrand launch; I need one artifact that catches anything we've missed before the date
Kicking off launch planning for the AI assistant feature; draft the cross-functional pre-launch checklist
Last launch we forgot to brief the support team and it was a mess; set up the readiness tracking so that never happens again
Put together a pre-launch checklist for the self-serve pricing change, owners and dates included
What needs to be verified across legal, ops, and marketing before Thursday's feature rollout? Make me the tracking doc
Major version release next sprint; create the readiness checklist with go/no-go criteria and a rollback plan
Our launch tier is major this time; generate the full cross-functional readiness list so we can review it at kickoff
The feature ships tomorrow; write the customer-facing announcement of what's new and improved
queries.notes: Communicating the ship, not coordinating readiness, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: We're not sure this should ship at all; design the A/B test that tells us whether to roll it out
queries.notes: Validating whether to ship belongs to experiment design, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: The launch happened last week; run a retrospective on how it went
Draft a PRD for the referral program so engineering can start building
It's a tiny copy change shipping from one team; just write the ticket description for it
queries.notes: Small single-team change; the skill's own boundary says skip the checklist

queries.q: Summarize the launch metrics from the dashboard and tell me whether we hit the activation target
Write a Python script that renames thousands of image files by date
Plan a five-day trip to Lisbon for our team offsite, flights and hotels included
Help me debug why our Kubernetes pods keep crash-looping after the deploy
Map the stakeholders for the platform migration so I know who needs to be aligned
